title: [HandshakeToFIRRTL] Issues with Verilog generated from Standard involving memories

features.name: async reset in always block sensitivity list
features.description: Code should include an always block with reset in the sensitivity list creating asynchronous reset behavior

features.name: synchronous reset check inside always block
features.description: Code should include an always block with reset checked inside the block as a synchronous condition

features.name: multi_port_memory_with_multiple_store_ports
features.description: Code should include a memory array with two separate store ports driven by different always blocks on different clocks

features.name: duplicate_wire_declarations_same_name
features.description: Code should include multiple wire declarations with identical names in the same scope

features.name: self_assignment_redundant_logic
features.description: Code should include an assign statement where a wire is assigned to itself creating redundant logic

features.name: unconnected_module_input_port
features.description: Code should include a module with input ports that are declared but not connected to any internal logic

features.name: memory_load_with_one_port_store
features.description: Code should include a memory with a dedicated load port and one store port where all operate asynchronously
